purpose: Structured factual snapshot and verification ledger for the modular online CV. The live page remains the public rendering source.
retired_claims: Seminar Schools as an operating institution

records.title: Leizu Academy (嫘祖 Academy)
records.note: English-language tutoring practice within Seminar Schools
records.description: English-language tutoring for the Ontario curriculum, the IB Diploma, and university admissions. Instruction in English. Family communication available in English, Mandarin, French, and Farsi. Sessions run privately or in seminar format, in person or online, weekly or in concentrated blocks before assessments.

records.title: Seminar Schools
records.note: Independent website and project archive in development
records.description: Independent website that organizes published teaching resources, research materials, essays, public information, and clearly labelled conceptual projects. Completed work, active development, and proposals are presented separately.

records.title: Designer, Bookworm Burrows
records.description: Teacher-led learning game in development. Assignments become quests inside the worlds of books and other course materials, while AI supports teacher preparation, improvisation, and resource development.

records.title: Editor, Teacher Resources
records.description: Developing index of classroom resources across English, history, mathematics, science, French, Indigenous Studies, civics, and computer science. Original and government sources are prioritized where available.

records.title: Editor, Marginalia
records.note: Commentary and research notes on Toronto public lectures
records.description: Developing record of public lectures, readings, and cultural events in Toronto, with research notes and longer commentary on selected events attended.

records.title: The Agora
records.description: Concept for public reading and discussion sessions in Toronto. The project remains in development and has not been presented as an operating public program.

records.title: Ohm Dome
records.description: Conceptual participatory artwork exploring shared rhythm, light, sound, and public gathering. Proposal and presentation work exist; the installation has not been built.

records.title: polymyth / AA*
records.note: Research framework and archive in development
records.description: Research and writing framework used to organize concepts, citations, project records, and methodological rules across the website. The archive distinguishes user-authored source material from public-facing summaries.

records.title: Toronto Arts and Public Events Resource (Polymythcal)
records.description: Developing resource that researches arts, humanities, educational, and civic events across Toronto. Work includes checking original sources, tracking changes, organizing listings, and improving information clarity and accessibility.

records.title: Florilegium
records.note: Reading and citation archive in development
records.description: Commonplace-book project for organizing passages, citations, reading notes, and connections across the wider research archive.

records.title: Teacher, Intelligent International
records.description: Mix of subjects including English, ESL, and social studies for international students in the GTA. Part-time, concurrent with other teaching roles.

records.title: Instructor, Tamwood Education Camps
records.description: Summer education camps for international students. Curriculum delivery, group facilitation, and activity coordination across multiple camp sessions.

records.title: Teacher, NOIC Academy
records.description: IB World School in Markham. Taught across both International Baccalaureate and Ontario Secondary School Diploma frameworks. Obtained IB TOK certification while teaching here.

records.title: IB Theory of Knowledge (TOK) Certification
records.description: IB-authorized certification for teaching Theory of Knowledge. Obtained while at NOIC Academy.

records.title: AODA Training
records.description: Training in accessibility requirements and inclusive service under the Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act.

records.title: Volunteer, BUMI Festival
records.note: Music, culture, movement, and community gathering
records.description: Volunteer support for a Toronto-area festival sustained through shared participation, cultural programming, and community work.

records.title: Volunteer, CNIB Night Steps at Earl Bales Park
records.note: Charity walk for Canadians who are blind or partially sighted
records.description: CNIB fundraising charity walk at Earl Bales Park in North York. Volunteered as sighted guide support.

records.title: Teacher, Willowdale High School
records.description: Ontario Secondary School Diploma program. Teaching English and humanities courses.

records.title: Instructor, RoboThink Toronto, Markham
records.description: Teaching robotics and STEM to elementary students up to Grade 4. Lessons use demonstrations, guided practice, observation, and adaptive support to help students build foundational technical skills.

records.title: Instructor, Happy Learning Education Center
records.description: Toronto-based education centre offering STEM, robotics, and language classes. Part-time teaching alongside other concurrent roles.

records.title: Teacher, Toronto Central Academy
records.description: Second stint. Private school offering OSSD and AP programs to international students. Transition to online delivery during COVID-19.

records.title: Online Educator, Smart Native, Hong Kong
records.description: Hong Kong-based online English education platform. Remote teaching concurrent with Toronto-based roles over nearly four years.

records.title: Event Security and Front-of-House; Special Events and Nightclub, Toronto
records.description: Two pre-pandemic years working private security at a downtown Toronto gay club and a rotating set of special events. Always the de-escalation role at the door, diplomatic conversation as the primary tool, physical intervention as the rare last resort. Ontario Security Guard License. Front-of-house and floor-management overlap kept the work close to hospitality rather than enforcement.

records.title: Assistant Manager, Pizza Pizza; Event Security; Various Contracts
records.description: Full kitchen operations, shift lead, front-of-house service through the pandemic period. Concurrent contract security work continuing from earlier Toronto roles.

records.title: ESL Instructor, Access Education
records.description: Toronto-based ESL school (Nacel Access English, established 1999). English language instruction for international adult learners.

records.title: Teacher, Toronto Central Academy
records.description: First stint. Private school offering OSSD and AP programs to international students in downtown Toronto.

records.title: Berkley Invigilation Standards Certification
records.description: Professional development in examination invigilation from Chongqing No.1 International Studies School. Subsequently retrained in invigilation standards at various other institutions.

records.title: Teacher, Chongqing No.1 International Studies School, China
records.note: A-Level English, AP Economics, AP English, IELTS
records.description: A-Level English, AP Economics, AP English, and IELTS preparation at this international school in Chongqing, China.

records.title: Instructor, East Van Education Center, Vancouver
records.description: Adult education program run through the Vancouver School Board. Concurrent with Pattison High School.

records.title: Teacher, Pattison High School, Vancouver
records.description: Private high school in Vancouver. Taught English, Economics, and Social Studies to international students.

records.title: Chef, Private Winery Estate, Florence, Italy
records.description: Secluded high-end private winery estate outside Florence. Worked as chef during breaks between teaching terms and EGS summer sessions.

records.title: Chef, Private Events and Festival Catering
records.description: Seasonal catering for private events and festivals during off-periods from teaching.

records.title: Nonviolent Communication
records.description: Online professional development in conflict communication, listening, and collaborative problem solving.

records.title: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy Certification
records.description: Udemy CBT Practitioner Certificate. Professional development in cognitive behavioral therapy techniques.

records.title: Motivation Coach Certificate
records.description: Udemy certification. Complete coaching system for motivation and personal development.

records.title: Python for Data Science and Machine Learning Bootcamp
records.description: Udemy bootcamp covering NumPy, Pandas, Seaborn, Matplotlib, Plotly, Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow, and NLP.

records.title: Machine Learning A-Z, Hands-On Python and R in Data Science
records.description: Udemy certification covering regression, classification, clustering, association rule learning, reinforcement learning, NLP, and deep learning.

records.title: Mindfulness Practitioner Course (Levels I, II, III, and Master)
records.description: Udemy certification. Four-level mindfulness practitioner program covering meditation, body scan, breathing techniques, and advanced practice.

records.title: TESOL Certification, Indiana University
records.description: Teaching English to Speakers of Other Languages certification. Obtained before beginning ESL teaching in China.

records.title: ESL Teacher (Volunteer), Sanxin Schools, Zhongshan
records.description: Volunteer ESL teaching at this Zhongshan school with a flexible schedule, traveling between assignments across Guangdong province.

records.title: ESL Teacher, Best Learning English (贝乐学科英语), Shenzhen
records.description: American K12 immersion curriculum for students aged 2 to 12 in Shenzhen. Full English-language instruction in a structured classroom environment.

records.title: Teaching Assistant, European Graduate School
records.description: Part of the MA program. Assisted with philosophy and critical theory seminars during the first year of the four-year summer intensive.

records.title: Founder, Project Manager and Translator, Independent Refugee Support Initiative
records.note: Serbia and Croatia; six countries; more than $8,000 raised
records.description: Founded and led an independent refugee support and fundraising initiative. Raised more than $8,000 for food, water, legal assistance, and urgent needs, verified changing information, translated communications, and coordinated professionals and supporters across six countries.

records.title: English Language Volunteer, Egypt
records.description: Volunteered at an English learning centre during travel through Egypt following the Balkan route operations.

records.title: Ship's Chef and Crew, S/V Hawila
records.description: 32-meter gaff-rigged ketch built 1935 in Risør, Norway. Galley chef and general crew during cargo and festival voyages.

records.title: Volunteer, Flydende By (Floating City), Copenhagen
records.note: Sustainable makerspace; cooking, construction, film support
records.description: Non-profit art collective building boats from recycled materials since 2008. Cooking, construction, and film production support.

records.title: Community Development Manager, Campus Crops Farmers Market
records.description: Paid community development role with a student-run urban agriculture initiative at McGill. Redesigned budgeting and expense tracking in Excel, coordinated volunteers, supported community programming, and developed partner relationships.

records.title: Front-of-House, Kitchen, Event Security at Various Venues
records.note: La Plante and Mile End venues
records.description: Short-term contracts and event-based work across Montreal's Mile End neighbourhood. Front-of-house service, kitchen work, and event security at venues including La Plante.

records.title: Conference Organizer, McMUN and SSUNS at IRSAM, McGill
records.note: University and secondary school Model UN
records.description: Organized both McMUN, the university-level conference with around 1600 delegates, and SSUNS, the secondary school version, through IRSAM.

records.title: Social Impact Strategy and Community Building Strategies
records.description: Online professional development in social impact planning and community building.

records.title: Research Assistant, McGill University
records.description: Philosophy department. Research assistance during final year at McGill before beginning the MA at EGS.

records.title: Claude Watson Arts Program, Screen Arts
records.description: Completed the Claude Watson Arts Program with a Screen Arts focus spanning film and video production, interviewing, camera awareness, performance and collaborative visual storytelling. Acted in Jesus Christ Superstar and the 2008 production One Thousand and One Nights and completed script writing and editing work in 2006.

records.title: Sears Ontario Drama Festival
records.description: Acted in Sears Ontario Drama Festival productions in Grades 9, 10 and 11 through Claude Watson in 2005, 2006 and 2007.

records.title: On-Camera Performer, GEICO “California” Commercial
records.description: Appeared as an on-camera performer in the San Francisco trolley scene, where passengers wave at the GEICO Gecko, in 2012.

records.title: On-Camera Interviewer, Street Kids International Volunteer Commercial
records.description: Served as the on-camera interviewer in a 2006 volunteer commercial produced through the Claude Watson Screen Arts curriculum for Street Kids International.

records.title: Carefree Lodge Long-Term Care Home
records.description: City of Toronto long-term care home in North York. Summer volunteer across all areas including resident care, recreation and activities, and administrative support.

records.title: Food Handlers Certificate
records.description: Ontario Food Handlers Certificate obtained during high school for Pizza Pizza work.

records.title: Crew Member, Pizza Pizza
records.description: High school through first year of university in Montreal. Crew member handling front counter, kitchen prep, and cash.

records.title: WWOOF (World Wide Opportunities on Organic Farms)
records.description: Periodic volunteer farm work across multiple countries over eight years, including the Azores in Portugal. Sustainable agriculture and organic farming practices.

records.title: Karate
records.description: Five years of karate training through elementary school.

records.title: Bronze Cross Swimming Certificate
records.description: Completed Bronze Cross and First Aid at age 16, developing lifesaving and water-safety skills.

records.title: Willowdale Middle School
records.description: TDSB middle school in North York. Participated in the school choir program.

records.title: Cummer Valley Middle School, Gifted Program (TDSB)
records.description: Transferred to Cummer Valley for Grade 8 to access the TDSB Gifted stream (IPRC identified). Standard pathway into Claude Watson Arts Program at Earl Haig.

records.title: Select Player, Spartacus Soccer Club
records.description: One of Canada's premier youth soccer clubs, founded 1994. Trained alongside players later scouted by professional clubs.
